welcome_to_fahem: AI Tutors in Your Pocket: Learn Smarter, Study Faster
hero_subtitle: Fahem turns your textbooks, lecture slides, and notes into an interactive, high-fidelity personal learning world. Master any curriculum, generate custom flashcards, study maps, and take mock exams with real-time feedback—all tailored directly to your unique brain.
bullet_1: 🚀 Instant Study Maps: Turn dense books into structured interactive maps that highlight exactly what you need to know.
bullet_2: 💬 Chat with Your Books: Ask questions directly to your curriculum and get clear, deep-vision explanations and step-by-step guidance.
bullet_3: 🎯 Master the Exam: Perfect your knowledge with personalized quizzes that adapt to your progress and boost your confidence.
footer_landing: Fahem Project Console • Google Cloud Rapid Agent Hackathon
dashboard_subtitle: Google ADK & MongoDB MCP Assistant Console
input_placeholder: Enter a custom database request (e.g. 'Analyze collections and show stats for fahem database')
footer_dashboard_line1: Fahem Console Home | Hackathon MongoDB Track Partner Integration
footer_dashboard_line2: Running on Firebase App Hosting • Secure Google Cloud Secret Manager Environment
preset_list_db_desc: Discovers all available databases and lists their basic metrics.
preset_get_stats_desc: Retrieves storage size, index counts, and document stats for 'fahem'.
preset_schema_desc: Samples documents from 'users' collection to derive its schema.
preset_list_col_desc: Lists all collections in the 'fahem' database.
sourcing_engine_subtitle: Configure database pipelines, ingest raw streams, and map document fields.
query_completed_success: Query completed successfully. Please check the logs console for output details.
stream_error_occurred: An error occurred while streaming the agent output:
preset_list_db_query: List the databases, list collections for 'fahem' database, and retrieve database stats.
preset_get_stats_query: Analyze database statistics for the 'fahem' database and summarize storage size and index metrics.
preset_schema_query: Get the collection schema for the 'users' collection inside the 'fahem' database and describe its fields.
preset_list_col_query: List all collections present in the 'fahem' database.
terms_subtitle: Terms, conditions, and artificial intelligence usage guidelines for Fahem.
privacy_subtitle: Your data privacy, processing, and security guidelines.
ai_disclaimer_text: Fahem leverages Google Gemini AI models and MongoDB Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to analyze schemas, view statistics, and run queries programmatically. While the assistant is highly capable, all database manipulations, recommendations, and execution plans generated by the AI are provided 'as-is' without warranties. Users should review and verify critical statements, schema transformations, and direct queries prior to execution in production environments.
report_tool_desc: Report an issue, bug, or submit database feedback. Your report will be processed directly by our secure MongoDB Agent.
report_success: Your report was successfully ingested into MongoDB via the MCP Agent!
section_swarm_desc: Discover the power of collaborative AI agents working together to elevate your educational journey. Each agent is a specialist dedicated to a critical pillar of your learning path.
swarm_agent_coordinator_desc: Intelligently orchestrates queries, delegates tasks to specialist sub-agents, and refines complex output into warm, natural answers.
swarm_agent_companion_desc: An interactive, friendly companion on your left that answers context-aware study questions and guides you through complex curriculum concepts.
swarm_agent_quiz_desc: Dynamically builds real-time interactive mock tests and flashcards customized to your school, grade, and active learning objectives.
swarm_agent_admin_desc: Performs secure database diagnostics, statistics harvesting, and real-time schema analytics using Atlas MCP.
section_features_desc: A comprehensive educational hub built to simplify structured learning, streamline collaborative study, and monitor academic progress in real-time.
feature_library_desc: Access curated study guides, resources, and shared documents tailored to your localized grade.
feature_subjects_desc: Explore your entire curriculum with expandable course directories, chapters, and high-fidelity study outlines.
feature_practice_desc: Sharpen your skills with interactive flashcards, practice problems, and self-evaluation modules.
feature_plan_desc: Create customized weekly study roadmaps with automated target notifications and progress milestones.
feature_timetable_desc: Build and visualize your class schedule using a beautiful, interactive drag-and-drop style planner.
feature_zatona_desc: Get rich, consolidated research digests, quick summaries, and AI-powered curriculum breakdowns.
section_why_fahem_desc: Fahem is not just another app — it is a smart, secure, and state-of-the-art educational ecosystem designed with your success in mind.
why_personalized_desc: From onboarding to study plans, everything adapts to your age, country, school, and selected educational branch.
why_bilingual_desc: A beautifully mirrored interface crafted with premium Cairo typography for Arabic and Outfit typography for English.
why_secure_desc: Powered by secure MongoDB Atlas databases, Firebase authentication, and robust super-admin shields.
why_intelligent_desc: Leverages cutting-edge Google Gemini AI models and specialized MCP toolsets to provide unparalleled study assistance.
why_clt_desc: Balances working memory loads (CLT & CTL balance) through beautiful progressive disclosure and clean structured concept blocks.
why_heutagogy_desc: Supports authentic student autonomy via the OEPA mobile learning model, allowing self-guided learning acceleration at your own pace.
why_security_desc: Strict token budget enforcement and GCP-level model armor to secure user privacy and prevent prompt injections.
why_dag_desc: Decoupled asynchronous processing loops and zero-disruption indexing for intelligent, parallelized workflow execution.
phone_empty: Please enter a valid phone number.
session_expired: Session expired. Please send code again.
phone_send_failed: Failed to send SMS code. Make sure reCAPTCHA is completed.
